name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement

---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Why is the current behavior not enough?

## Proposed solution

What you would like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you have thought about.

## Additional context

Keep in mind the project aims to stay lightweight, native, privacy-conscious,
and testable. Anything that helps explain the request is welcome.
